name: Gnocchi
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Egg Beaters® (99% Egg Substitute) or equivalent to 1 egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked potatoes, pepper, salt, basil, and flour in a mixing bin and mix for one minute.
2. Slowly add the melted butter.
3. Add additional flour, 1 tablespoon at a time, to keep the dough from extruding until it reaches a total of 4 cups.
4. Cut the mixture into 1-inch pieces.
5. Cook in 6 quarts of boiling water for about 5 minutes, or until firm.
6. For instant potatoes: Mix 1 cup flour, 1 cup instant mashed potatoes, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 egg in a machine. Add 2 tablespoons melted butter (or oil) and hot water or hot milk to fill the batch line to the dry ingredients. Adjust with more hot liquid, 1 tablespoon at a time, if needed.
7. If necessary, return the first few inches of extruded pasta back into the mixing bin until it becomes smooth.
8. The gnocchi turned out quite good, especially with the addition of basil.
